issues.description: Card has Counter trigger with conditional trash action, but second effect uses 'Trigger' which is undefined. The card should have only one Counter effect.
Second effect with 'Trigger' and ReturnToHand action does not match card text at all. Card text makes no mention of returning cards to hand or filtering by cost.
TrashFromHand is marked with optional 'may', but DSL does not indicate this is optional. Should use optional:true or restructure as conditional.
Duration 'EndOfBattle' is correct for 'during this battle', but verify this value exists in official duration enum.
